title: Mystica
description: A mod that adds new magic-related features to your game, mostly related to a new biome
body:
> ## MYSTICA
### A mod about adding a brand new magical biome to the overworld
![Mystica banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b20443100e890ba727397b4c83e1b37545a68203.png)

<center>

### Join our discord to stay up to date with mod updates, teasers, and more! (click)
[![Discord banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cea9cd7dc8511b56c21d5eef30b040a9f9f81d2.png)](https://discord.gg/mEYDh4SUWN)

### Requires GeckoLib!
[![GeckoLib logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/197e417b0e192c49a53b39d7ad40764848f6959a.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

</center>

# THIS MOD IS ABANDONED!

## BIOMES

> ### Enchanted Forest

The Enchanted forest is the main source of content throughout the mod. All things related to mystica are found here. You will be able to find unique features, such as falling leaves and luminous deer, as well as normal animals and allays. The Enchanted Forest is safer at night, as hostile mob spawns are decreased there.

![The enchanted forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb69d523145e1851237a045284130217235aa14b.png)

## MOBS

> ### Luminous Deer

Luminous deer can be found commonly during night (they can spawn very rarely at day), and can drop Raw Lumison and Luminous Deer Antlers. Luminous deer are neutral, and will attack threats with its antlers, charging into them. Luminous deer glow in the dark, but don't give off any light levels (similar to the glow squid)

![The luminous deer, and its uses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f34fdfa048859f7e4bb9a1a9f6eed72f0a1e5256.png)

![The luminous deer at night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcc1e8a7fd2707ea1426d1b622c680b1914895b8.png)

## ORES

> ### Alturite

Found exclusively in the Enchanted Forest, Alturite is a relatively rare metal that has toxic properties, and can be used to make equipment that can poison targets, but also needs luminous deer antlers. You can also make a staff with Alturite which shoots an orb of light, which also poisons targets

![All the alturite related items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2a5d6b7d95ca77894ca0e3c5eb7ecd2fb5d54d3.png)

## ITEMS

> ### Lumison

Lumison is dropped from luminous deer, and is equievilent to steak in terms of nutrition and saturation. However, when consumed, it will give the consumer Glowing for 1 and a half minutes

![Raw and cooked lumison in an item frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a103008c27dfb0e32d382a355f0b485377f2154.png)

> ### Luminous Deer Antlers

Dropped from luminous deer, they are currently only used to make Alturite equipment

## VIDEOS

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OftrHDk8Ows" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Q&A

> Q: Will you update this mod?

A: No, it's abandoned

> Q: Can i use this in my modpack?

A: I don't suggest it, but sure.
